title: System
description: A read-only snapshot of the server's application, runtime, and storage state. Renders whatever the server could gather, even if parts of it are down.
loadError: Could not load system information. Try refreshing.
refreshError: Could not refresh system information. Showing the last known values.
staleDataNote: Showing data from the last successful load; the last refresh failed.
copyFailed: Could not copy system info to clipboard

database.title: Database
database.downNote: The database is unreachable. Values above may be stale or unavailable.

storage.title: Storage
storage.libraryPathsUnavailable: Could not determine library paths; the database is unreachable.
